description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run Tests that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow should have concurrent runs cancelled. It should have three ubuntu-latest jobs: lint, benchmark, and build. The lint job checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.12, and runs pre-commit. The benchmark job checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.13, installs dependencies, and runs benchmarks with CodSpeed. The build job, which depends on lint, sets up Python 3.12 or 3.13 in a matrix, installs dependencies, tests with Pytest, and uploads coverage to Codecov.
